name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LinkID

labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

## ✨ Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing -->

## 🤔 Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address? -->
<!-- e.g. "As a user, I want to be able to reorder links so that I can control which appears first on my profile" -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## 🗂️ Files Likely Involved

<!-- Which files would need to be changed? -->
- [ ] `lib/platforms.ts` — platform detection
- [ ] `lib/platformIcons.ts` — platform icons
- [ ] `app/dashboard/` — dashboard UI
- [ ] `app/[username]/` — public profile
- [ ] `app/api/` — API routes
- [ ] `prisma/schema.prisma` — database schema
- [ ] Other: ___

## 🏷️ Difficulty & Labels

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] `good first issue` — beginner friendly
- [ ] `medium` — requires some codebase knowledge

- [ ] `nsoc-26` — open for NSoC contributors
